name: MISP
description: Take action with Malware Information Sharing Platform

parameters.description: Destination email addresses to be added as attributes

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: URLs to be added as attributes

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma separated list of tags

parameters.name: json
parameters.description: JSON key value list of attributes
